title: Test Subject

moves.title: Respawn
effects: Revive with increased max HP and new power

move_pattern: Three-phase boss with progressive difficulty. Phase 1: Cycles between Bite and Skull Bash. Upon defeat, respawns into Phase 2 using only Multi-Claw (hit count increases by 1 each use). Upon second defeat, enters Phase 3 cycling through Lacerate, Big Pounce, and Burning Growl.
notes: A multi-phase monster with resurrection mechanics. First respawn increases max HP to 212 and applies Painful Stabs power. Second respawn increases max HP to 313, applies Nemesis power, and removes Adaptable/Painful Stabs. Each respawn increases the monster's visual scale by 10%. Multi-Claw starts with 3 hits and gains 1 additional hit each time it's used throughout Phase 2. Title includes a counter that increments with each defeat across runs.
